===============================================
EMERGENCY-BYPASS — direct-strategy-on-standard-project
Refusal that was bypassed:
  RELEASE HALTED — UNVERIFIED (direct-strategy-on-standard-project)
  config.yaml declares project_kind: standard but git.strategy: direct.
  Direct-strategy releases require project_kind: prototype AND a signed
  exception covering skipped-pr/skipped-ci.
Reason supplied: prod 500s on /api/release/v0.18.0 — rolling back
Owner: magznikitin
This bypass is recorded in:
  .tl/emergencies/20260522T184211Z-prod-rollback.yaml
===============================================

  [graph-stale].
